# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    protocol: http
    host: users-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths:
          - /users
          - /users/
          - ~/users/(?<id>[^/]+)$
          - /auth
          - /auth/
          - /profile
          - /profile/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426

  - name: orders-service
    protocol: http
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths:
          - /orders
          - /orders/
          - ~/orders/(?<id>[^/]+)$
          - /checkout
          - /checkout/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426

  - name: inventory-service
    protocol: http
    host: inventory-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths:
          - /inventory
          - /inventory/
          - ~/inventory/(?<sku>[^/]+)$
          - /products
          - /products/
          - ~/products/(?<id>[^/]+)$
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426

  - name: payments-service
    protocol: http
    host: payments-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: payments-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths:
          - /payments
          - /payments/
          - /billing
          - /billing/
          - /webhooks/payments
          - /webhooks/payments/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426

  - name: notifications-service
    protocol: http
    host: notifications-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: notifications-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths:
          - /notifications
          - /notifications/
          - /webhooks/notifications
          - /webhooks/notifications/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
          http_statuses: [200, 204]
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 3
          http_statuses: [200, 201, 202, 204, 301, 302, 303, 304, 307, 308]
          interval: 0
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
          interval: 0
    targets:
      - target: users-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2

        weight: 100

        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: correlation-id
    enabled: true
    config:
      header_name: X-Correlation-ID
      generator: uuid
      echo_downstream: true

  - name: prometheus
    enabled: true

  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins: ["*"]
      methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]
      headers: ["Accept", "Accept-Version", "Content-Type", "Authorization", "X-Requested-With", "X-Correlation-ID"]
      exposed_headers: ["X-Correlation-ID"]
      credentials: false
      max_age: 3600

  - name: request-size-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      allowed_payload_size: 10
      size_unit: megabytes
      require_content_length: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: false
    config:
      minute: 600
      policy: local

  - name: key-auth
    enabled: false
    config:
      key_names: ["apikey", "x-api-key"]
      hide_credentials: true

  - name: acl
    enabled: false
    config:
      allow: ["public"]

consumers:
  - username: demo-consumer
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "replace-with-real-api-key"
    acls:
      - group: public
